items.headline: Alabaster Board of Education welcomes Jamie Parker
items.body: Alabaster City Schools welcomed Jamie Parker as the newest member of the Alabaster Board of Education.
items.summary: The district welcomed Jamie Parker following her appointment to the Alabaster Board of Education.
items.match_reason: Published by the configured Alabaster City Schools Instagram account.

items.headline: Thompson High School recognizes the Class of 2026
items.body: Thompson High School honored the Class of 2026 at Senior Honors Night.
items.summary: The district highlighted graduating seniors and more than $31 million in scholarship offers.
items.match_reason: Published by the configured Alabaster City Schools Instagram account.

items.headline: Alabaster seniors participate in the Parade of Graduates
items.body: Seniors reunited with former teachers during the annual Alabaster City Schools Parade of Graduates.
items.summary: The district celebrated graduating seniors and their connections with former teachers.
items.match_reason: Published by the configured Alabaster City Schools Instagram account.
